commands.narrative:
## Roster Changes Since Yesterday

No roster changes since yesterday. The active_strategies_snapshot remains at 80 entries (74 enabled) for the sixth consecutive day. All 15 INVALID strategies flagged in the ai-2026-06-14-002 escalation remain enabled — the batch kill is now **day 4 without operator execution**. This is the dominant operational issue.

## Headline

**v9shadow-velmono-dev (composite score 71.5) holds three gates and remains the only promotable candidate in the field.** Net SOL +3.547, drop_top3 +1.808 (edge survives outlier strip), monthly run rate 2.38 SOL/mo. The only blocking gate is monthly (2.38 vs 3.75 bar). At the current observed pace of ~3 trades/day, closure of the monthly gap depends primarily on trade quality, not volume — the strategy needs its win rate in the next cohort to match the historical 30-day window.

## Today's P&L

No trades have closed today (UTC 06-15, early morning). Yesterday (2026-06-14), the shadow book ran 154 trades. Bright spots by strategy day: v9shadow-velmono-dev +0.116 SOL on 3 trades; V29.3 +0.127 SOL on 3 trades. Deep red: v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono −0.555 SOL on 3 trades (INVALID since trigger met yesterday); v12-vel2050-liq-dd15 −0.577 SOL on 3 trades; v35-vel2050-dev3 −0.542 SOL on 11 trades. The bleeding strategies are all on the kill list — they are the reason the aggregate daily P&L is negative.

## INVALID Backlog — Day 4 Escalation

Leave-one-out confirms **7 strategies are definitively INVALID at n ≥ 100**:

| Strategy | n | total_net_sol | drop_top3 | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono | 128 | +1.722 | −0.642 | INVALID (trigger met 2026-06-14) |
| v52a-sm-shape | 213 | −4.493 | −6.091 | INVALID |
| v52d-sm-freshdev | 155 | −3.115 | −4.805 | INVALID |
| v35-vel2050-dev3 | 121 | −4.003 | −5.664 | INVALID |
| v46-v25-green-only | 111 | −3.233 | −4.935 | INVALID |
| v12-vel2050-liq-dd15 | 109 | −0.607 | −2.844 | INVALID |
| v35-vel2050-buyers-ratio | 103 | −6.147 | −8.088 | INVALID |

Three more will clear n=100 within days with confirmed-negative drop_top3: V31.5 (n=99, drop3=−8.994), V30.1 (n=98, drop3=−6.272), v51-confirm-gate (n=97, drop3=−4.803). These should be included in the batch kill. The full 15-strategy delete block is in ai-2026-06-14-002. **Recommend operator execute it immediately.** Every day of delay adds ~1–2 SOL of aggregate shadow losses.

## Emerging Bright Spot: v24-rugger-climbing

v24-rugger-climbing (serial_rugger + climbing_t30_t45, TP150/SL25, shadow) is the most interesting sub-100 strategy: n=39, total_net_sol +2.787, drop_top3 +0.529, monthly run rate 2.67 SOL/mo. It is the only other strategy with positive drop_top3 besides velmono-dev. The serial_rugger filter is rare — last trade 69h ago — so n will accumulate slowly. At the current rate, n=100 is approximately 6–8 weeks away. Watch criterion: “n≥60 and drop_top3<0” (kill); no action until then.

## Cross-Day Patterns

The same themes recur across all 6 days of recent_reports: (1) velmono-dev and rugger-climbing accumulate while the vel20-top5 family bleeds; (2) 15–20 edge_decay anomalies fire each cycle with DECAYING flags on v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono, v28-vel20-top5-1s-ttp, v32-vel20-top5-1s, v33/v34 variants, and v40-whale/acc families; (3) no kill commands have been executed. The persistent DECAYING flag across the entire vel20-top5 family (v26, v28, v32, v33, v34 variants) is a regime signal, not isolated noise — the top5<10% filter may be underperforming in the current market environment.

## Honest Assessment

v9shadow-velmono-dev’s +3.547 SOL lifetime is real edge — drop_top3=+1.808 confirms the pattern survives outlier removal. The monthly gap (2.38 vs 3.75) is the only honest constraint. v24-rugger-climbing’s drop_top3=+0.529 is small but positive; it is not safe to promote at n=39. The main risk in the current session is operator inaction on the kill backlog — 15 INVALID strategies running means every day the aggregate PnL picture is obscured by known losers and shadow capacity is diluted.

## Operator Next Step

**Push the ai-2026-06-14-002 delete batch now.** That single action clears 15 INVALID strategies, recovers shadow capacity, and makes the aggregate P&L readable. After that, monitor velmono-dev monthly rate through July — if it converges to 3.75 SOL/mo, promote to live.

anomalies.detail: ESCALATION DAY 4: 15 INVALID strategies remain enabled. ai-2026-06-14-002 delete batch unexecuted. Approximate shadow loss rate from INVALID strategies: ~1-2 SOL/day.

20 edge_decay anomalies firing: v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono, v28-vel20-top5-1s-ttp, v32-vel20-top5-1s, v33-vel20-top5-ttp5, v34-vel20-top5-minlift all DECAYING. Entire vel20-top5 family showing regime-level degradation.

v9shadow-velmono-dev flagged DECAYING by anomaly detector (recent-30 median -22.84% vs all-time median -2.09%). Conflicts with leave-one-out drop_top3=+1.808 SOL. Use leave-one-out as authoritative — DECAYING flag reflects recent distribution shape only.
v24-rugger-climbing: no trade in 69h. serial_rugger filter is inherently rare — expected behavior. Pipeline healthy per diagnose.

patterns: velmono-dev has appeared in daily winners for 5+ consecutive days — consistent edge confirmed by leave-one-out.
vel20-top5 family (v26, v28, v32, v33, v34 variants) DECAYING consistently for 6+ days — appears to be a regime shift, not isolated noise.
v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono drop_top3 crossed zero (−0.642 SOL at n=128 as of 2026-06-15) — INVALID trigger met. Kill proposal in ai-2026-06-14-001 still PROPOSED.
confirmed_recovery filter appears in 5 of top-20 best-combos (opt_avg_ret 9–20%). v28-vel50200-recovery already shadow-testing this; no trade in 246h (rare filter pair).

Panel 7 walk-forward: holders >= 100 backfill is OVERFIT (11.8pp degradation). Best-combos ranks it #4 (opt_avg_ret=17.6%) — do not build strategy on backfill holders without verified measured holders.

action_items.summary: ESCALATION DAY 4: Push strategy-commands.json delete block for all 15 INVALID strategies. Aggregate shadow loss rate ~1-2 SOL/day. Supersedes ai-2026-06-14-002.

Watch v9shadow-velmono-dev monthly through July. Score 71.5, 3 gates clear (n=113, drop3=+1.808, total=+3.547). Monthly 2.38 SOL/mo vs 3.75 bar. Promote when monthly clears 3.75; kill if drop_top3 falls below 0 at n>=130.
Watch v24-rugger-climbing to n=100. n=39, total=+2.787, drop3=+0.529, monthly=2.67 SOL/mo. Kill criterion: n>=60 and drop_top3<0. Promotes if all 4 gates clear at n=100.
